comments.text: 필리핀의 비현실적인 대자연, 숨이 멎을 듯합니다!

comments.author: @megapangolin1093
comments.text: The Philippines is amazing, and the images are incredible, but the overweening hyperbolic narration doesn't do the culture justice, it is not telling us anything, just spouting AI generated repetitive scripts that achieve little. Not subscribed or, unfortunately, liked because of this.  We gave up after 15 minutes.

replies.author: @megapangolin1093
replies.text: @WorldDiscoveries11  in particular, "unreal", when something is patently real, "other worldly" when we have no reference points relating to that/those places, repeated just destroys confidence and sincerity.  Humans dont tend to do this, in Western societies anyway. Objectivity and honesty always win over people.

replies.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
replies.text: I appreciate your honest feedback regarding the narration and will certainly keep it in mind for future projects.

comments.author: @myrajoy1437
comments.text: Thanks again for sharing your amazing video

replies.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
replies.text: You're very welcome! I'm so glad you enjoyed the video and got to experience a bit of the unseen Philippines with me.

comments.author: @ATLAS_UNBOUND_26
comments.text: The Philippines never stops surprising — just when you think you've seen it all, there's another hidden island or limestone cliff that looks completely impossible. Nature went all out on this place.

replies.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
replies.text: So true! The Philippines truly is a treasure trove of unreal places, and we're just scratching the surface.

comments.author: @eduardoquiban947
comments.text: FINGER  FROM  GOD   NOT  EVULOTION  BUT  BY  CREATION;,  GOD   ENGINEERING  NO  ONE  CAN   REPLICATE    BY  GO'D'S   DESINGN   FOR  HUMAN

comments.author: @Aventurex-686
comments.text: The Philippines is just on another level. Some of these spots don't even look real—it’s like stepping into a fantasy movie. It’s such a powerful reminder of how magical the world is when we just let nature be. Absolutely breathtaking! 🇵🇭✨

replies.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
replies.text: I completely agree! The Philippines truly is on another level, and it's incredible how nature creates such fantastical landscapes. It really makes you appreciate the magic all around us.

comments.author: @hiderplanet
comments.text: Honestly, these impossible places look unreal, like hidden gems waiting to be discovered.

replies.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
replies.text: It’s truly incredible how many hidden gems there are to discover across these islands!

comments.author: @HiddenEarthTV-i1b
comments.text: The Philippines looks absolutely incredible through your footage

replies.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
replies.text: Thank you so much, I'm so happy you enjoyed the footage of this beautiful country!

comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text: Truly an eye-opening journey! From the heights of the rice terraces to the depths of the Tubbataha Reefs, this is a masterful tribute to the beauty of the Philippines.

replies.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
replies.text: So glad you enjoyed the journey! The Philippines truly is a treasure, and I'm thrilled I could share its beauty with you.
